channel.title: DRMN Blog — Sleep & Focus Sounds
channel.description: Guides on white noise, sleep sounds, and focus audio for better rest and concentration.

item.title: White Noise for Sleep: What It Is, Why It Works, and How to Use It
item.description: White noise masks sudden sounds that wake you at night. Here is how it works, how loud it should be, and how to build a simple bedtime routine around it.
